name: Topical DNA repair enzyme lotion reduced actinic keratoses in a small placebo-controlled trial
summary: A very small placebo-controlled trial adds preliminary human support for topical DNA repair enzyme products in actinic keratosis.
statement: A small randomized placebo-controlled trial found greater reduction in actinic keratoses with topical DNA repair enzyme lotion than with placebo.
population_or_model: Patients with actinic keratoses on the face or scalp
quantitative_note: The abstract reports 13 completions; the DNA repair enzyme group had a 46.6% actinic-keratosis decrease after 8 weeks and further decrease at week 12, while placebo increased at week 12 (P=0.0026).
caveats: The trial was very small and single-center.
Actinic keratosis burden is a premalignant skin endpoint, not direct systemic aging evidence.
The study does not establish durable post-treatment benefit.
